business.headline: Bitcoin above $70,000, altcoins surge up to 23%: Is a new crypto rally starting?The crypto market is showing fresh signs of strength. Bitcoin has reclaimed the $70,000 level, and altcoins are posting strong gains, leaving investors wondering if this momentum can sustain in the coming weeks.

RBI's subtle growth warning is easy to miss, but it's thereRBI's growth warning was subtle, but it was evident in Governor Sanjay Malhotra's monetary policy statement. In this article, we take a closer look at the biggest risks to India's economy.

Sensex, Nifty jump, but IT stocks trade flat. Will they perform post Q4 results?The market rally was broad-based, with strong gains across banking, financial, auto and other sectors. However, IT stocks stood out as the only laggards, trading flat or with marginal gains despite the sharp market rise.

Gold up Rs 5,000, silver jumps Rs 14,000: Will the rally continue?Precious metals are glittering again. In a short span, gold prices have risen by Rs 5,000 and silver has surged Rs 14,000, prompting fresh interest from investors trying to decode whether this momentum will continue.

What is RBI's plan after rupee's recent fall vs US dollar? RBI Governor explainsRBI's focus will remain on managing sharp swings in the currency rather than controlling its direction, as global factors continue to drive movements in the rupee.

RBI keeps repo rate unchanged at 5.25%: How it impacts your EMI and home loan plansIn a welcome move for homebuyers, the RBI has kept the repo rate unchanged at 5.25%. This means no immediate increase in EMIs, offering much-needed relief and stability to borrowers planning their finances.

Elevated energy prices, disruptions at Hormuz likely to impact growth: RBI GuvThe warning comes even as the central bank projects India's economy to grow 6.9% this financial year, signalling that while the growth engine is intact, fresh global shocks are building.

Gold at Rs 1.53 lakh, silver jumps 5%: Why are prices rising today?The rise in precious metals comes alongside a broader rally in equities and a sharp fall in crude oil prices, as investors adjust to changing risk conditions.

RBI keeps key lending rates unchanged at 5.25%, stance remains 'neutral'The Reserve Bank of India has kept its key policy rate unchanged at 5.25%, marking no change since December 2025, as policymakers chose to wait amid rising global uncertainty linked to the West Asia conflict.

Adani moves US court seeking dismissal of SEC fraud case, says lawsuit lacks jurisdictionIn a pre-motion letter filed ahead of a planned April 30 motion seeking dismissal of the lawsuit, Adanis through their lawyers said the SEC's claims over a 2021 bond sale by the group's renewable energy arm, Adani Green Energy Ltd (AGEL) are legally flawed on multiple grounds.
IndiGo shares rally 10%: Why is the stock up today?As of 9:50 am, IndiGo shares were trading at Rs 4,681.50, up 9.68% on the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE).

Iran-US announce ceasefire: How will it impact RBI MPC decision today?RBI MPC: The ceasefire between the US and Iran, which has led to a sharp fall in crude oil prices, is expected to play a key role in shaping the RBI's stance. Lower oil prices ease pressure on inflation and the overall economy, giving the central bank more room to maintain stability.

Sensex surges nearly 3,000 points: 4 things investors should knowAs of 11:02 am, the BSE Sensex surged nearly 3,000 points to 77,535.53, while the Nifty 50 neared the 24,000 mark. Investor wealth jumped by over Rs 14 lakh crore in early trade.

Wave of green on Dalal Street as markets cheer Iran-US ceasefire, Hormuz openingDalal Street surged as ceasefire hopes and falling crude oil prices boosted investor confidence, adding Rs 14 lakh crore in early trade.

Sensex, Nifty opening: Stock market likely to rally today. Here's whyStock markets are likely to open higher today as crude oil falls below $100 and global markets rally. Here's what is driving Sensex and Nifty today.

What caused crude oil prices to drop below $100 today as Eastern markets jump?Brent crude dropped to around $94–95 per barrel, while US WTI crude fell to about $96, marking a steep fall of over 13% in a single session.

Same CTC, lower take-home? The 50% wage rule explainedYou may still be earning the same CTC, but your in-hand salary could be lower. In this article, we explain how the 50% wage rule is changing salary structures.

Japan's Nikkei surges as oil prices slide amid US, Iran ceasefireJapan's economy is particularly vulnerable to rises in crude oil prices because of its heavy reliance on imported energy. US crude futures fell about 16.5% to $94 a barrel.

Oil prices fall below $100 after Trump announces two-week ceasefireTrump's turnaround came shortly before his deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz, where 20% of the world's oil transits, or face widespread attacks on its civilian infrastructure.

Confused by the new tax law? Here are 6 sections that matter most to youThe Income Tax Act 2025 has introduced several updates, leaving many taxpayers unsure about what to track. But once you focus on the most relevant sections, the picture becomes much clearer.

entertainment.headline: Mrunal Thakur dives into action in a saree for Dacoit, calls it toughest genre yet Mrunal Thakur turned action star with Dacoit, calling it her toughest genre yet as she takes on high-octane stunts for the first time. The actor opened up about stepping out of her comfort zone, performing intense sequences, and discovering a new side to her craft.

Atlee's birthday gift to Allu Arjun is Raaka, an idea he held for 18 years Director Atlee shared a special message on Allu Arjun's birthday, while unveiling the title and first-look poster of their film, Raaka. The grand fantasy actioner is expected to release in 2027.

Price of women standing up: Samay Raina on Apoorva Mukhija FIR row Comedian Samay Raina highlighted the courage and cost faced by Apoorva Mukhija after she bravely stood up against derogatory remarks, receiving FIRs and threats in return.

Ranveer Singh is why I exist in films, he's my lucky charm: Mrunal Thakur Mrunal Thakur has expressed heartfelt gratitude towards Ranveer Singh, calling him her lucky charm for shaping her early film career. She also praised Ranveer's deep and layered performance in Dhurandhar: The Revenge.

Priyadarshan: Akshay Kumar can look like a common man, SRK is very urban Filmmaker Priyadarshan shared insights on Akshay Kumar and Shah Rukh Khan's acting nuances. In an exclusive interview, he noted that Akshay can look like a common man but Shah Rukh Khan can't, since his body language is very polished and urban.

Raaka: Allu Arjun turns animalistic in Atlee's next, first look poster out On Allu Arjun's 44th birthday, the makers of his upcoming film with Atlee revealed its title, Raaka, along with a striking first poster. Also starring Deepika Padukone, the film marks their first collaboration.

Samay Raina shares the bold Abhishek Bachchan joke he didn't tell Big B on KBC Samay Raina shared behind-the-scenes anecdotes from Kaun Banega Crorepati, including the joke he chose not to make to Amitabh Bachchan and the story he told to "play the room." In his latest special, he also revisited the Ranveer Allahbadia controversy, revealing what really happened off-camera.

Amitabh Bachchan shares cryptic note on life's uncertainties, calls truth elusive Amitabh Bachchan shares a cryptic blog post reflecting on life's uncertainties and the search for meaning. The actor's introspective note highlights the elusive nature of answers and his ongoing journey of self-reflection.
Samay Raina announces India's Got Latent Season 2 a year after controversy Samay Raina announced the return of his popular roast-style talent show, India's Got Latent, with a bolder new season.

Inside Dhurandhar's visual language: The eye that gave Aditya Dhar's film its soul From real stunts to detailed locations to controlled contrast, Dhurandhar's cinematography builds a visual grammar where every frame carries narrative weight.

Nayanthara takes stage as Vignesh Shivan's wife, leaves him emotional at LIK event At the Love Insurance Kompany pre-release event, Nayanthara appeared on stage as Vignesh Shivan's wife, breaking her usual absence from film events. Their heartfelt moment touched fans as the film prepares for its April 10 release.

Samay Raina says Ranveer Allahbadia made the parent joke 8 times, he kept one Comedian Samay Raina addressed the Ranveer Allahbadia controversy in his latest special, revealing what really happened behind the scenes of the viral moment. He explained why he chose to keep the now-infamous question, and what followed after.

Anna Wintour shares magazine cover with The Devil Wears Prada alter ego Meryl Streep Anna Wintour and Meryl Streep graced Vogue's cover together, celebrating their unique connection inspired by The Devil Wears Prada. The upcoming sequel will hit theatres on May 1.

Actor Zareen Khan's mother dies of prolonged illness in Mumbai Actor Zareen Khan's mother, Parveen Khan, died in Mumbai on Wednesday. The actor had often spoken about her mother's illness on social media.

Allu Arjun birthday special: 5 films beyond Pushpa that define rewatch appeal From Ala Vaikuntapuramulo to Arya 2, we revisit five Allu Arjun entertainers packed with the actor's unique style, emotion, and nostalgia. These films prove why the rewatch value of Tollywood's Stylish Star remains uncompromised, just like Pushpa.

Deepika Padukone defends her silence on Dhurandhar 2, trolls the troll Deepika Padukone put an end to the social media gossip about her silence on Ranveer Singh's blockbuster Dhurandhar: The Revenge. The actor gave a witty reply on Instagram, proving support isn't always loud.

Did Salman Khan change Maatrubhumi's script to be anti-war? Here's the truth Salman Khan's film Maatrumbhumi, earlier titled Battle of Galwan, shifts focus from war to a message of peace. The film, set against the 2020 Indo-China conflict, aims to celebrate India and its soldiers without glorifying war.

Dhurandhar 2 Day 20: Film crosses Rs 1,641 crore globally, Rs 1,237 crore in India It's Day 20 and there's no stopping for Dhurandhar 2. The actioner continues its strong box office run, surpassing Rs 1,641 crore in gross collections globally and Rs 1,237 crore in India.

Real duffer: Siddharth Anand's cryptic jibe follows Zakir Khan's Dhurandhar remark Without taking names, filmmaker Siddharth Anand has seemingly slammed Zakir Khan's recent 'Dhurandhar' remark at an awards show. Khan said in jest that film folk from Bandra to Juhu were jealous of Dhurandhar's success.

general news.headline: China, not Pakistan, the real player behind US-Iran ceasefire? Live UpdatesOver the course of the Iran-US war, China, one of Tehran's key allies, remained a silent player. However, it has now emerged that China's discreet diplomacy and a last-minute intervention got Iran on board for the two-week ceasefire deal. Thus, China, and not Pakistan, has emerged as the real player.

Get lost vs shouting claims: Trinamool, EC meet sparks political storm in BengalA seven-minute meeting between TMC leaders and the Election Commission has sparked a political storm, with explosive claims, counter-allegations, and an impeachment push set to intensify the confrontation.

Sir, I'll tell you everything: Constable key to death penalty for 9 Tamil Nadu copsHead Constable Revathi's courageous testimony, defying threats and institutional pressure, proved pivotal in securing death sentences for nine Tamil Nadu police personnel five years after a father and son died in custodial torture.

Why Trump blinked on the Iran warUS President Donald Trump's war cry turned into just a cry, and then a walk-back. Because at home, there's a war too. A figurative one. His threats to wipe out a civilisation echoed louder in the US than they could in Iran. Here's why Trump blinked, again.

The last of Iran's Jews: Caught between Islam, Israel and historyHandcrafted ByOur Editors Iran has one of the oldest continuous populations of Jews in the world, dating back 2,700 years. Jews now number just 10,000 after fleeing Iran following the 1979 Islamic Revolution, which a section of the community helped turn into success. This is their story through the ages.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's fearless takedown of Jasprit Bumrah captured the same rare, transcendent magic as that legendary 1989 encounter on Tuesday.

Expeditiously exit Iran: India's advisory for its citizens hours after ceasefireThe latest advisory is aimed at encouraging citizens to leave the country, specifically targeting those seeking to exit the conflict-torn nation.

TVK loses one seat even before its debut contest in Tamil Nadu pollsThe nomination of a TVK candidate from the Edappadi constituency has been rejected, and the candidate has now gone missing, with the party alleging kidnapping.

Live: Iraq reopens airspace amid easing tensions after ceasefireUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: In a sudden shift from threats to pause, Donald Trump said he would halt US military action against Iran, at least for now, signalling a possible opening for diplomacy. Posting on Truth Social, Trump said, "I agree to suspend the bombing and attack of Iran for a period of two weeks," framing the move as part of a broader push toward a ceasefire. The decision, he said, followed conversations with Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Army chief Asim Munir, who urged him to hold off on planned strikes. Iran has accepted Pakistan's two-week ceasefire proposal. The ceasefire has been approved by the country's new supreme leader, signalling a possible opening for de-escalation. Iran said talks with the US should not be interpreted as signalling the end of the war, adding that its 10-point proposal calls for lifting all primary and secondary sanctions, full compensation payments, and the release of all frozen Iranian assets. Tehran said it will only accept the war's conclusion once all details are finalised in line with the 10-point plan, Iranian media reported. Negotiations with the US are to be held in Islamabad on 10th April (Friday) to finalise details. Catch all the live updates at Indiatoday.in.

I stopped using Blinkit and Instamart for 30 days. My wallet (and health) thanked meI deleted Blinkit and Instamart from my phone just to see if I could survive in this digital-first world. It seems, I thrived.

Iran, Oman get to levy Hormuz transit fee under 2-week ceasefire plan: ReportThe US-Iran ceasefire plan includes reopening the Strait of Hormuz with a provision allowing Iran and Oman to levy transit fees on ships.

Eat beef but at home: Himanta Sarma clarifies stand ahead of pollsThe Assam Cattle Preservation Act, 2021, does not prohibit private consumption of beef but bans its sale and consumption in public places, including restaurants, and within a 5-km radius of temples and sattras.

Flying Flea C6: A soft landing or a rough ride ahead?The Flying Flea C6 marks Royal Enfield's first foray into electric mobility, and we've ridden the bike to assess its strengths and shortcomings. What works in its favour, and what doesn't? Let's find out.

Countdown to Iran ceasefire: The 90 minutes that stopped a warIt was 6.32 pm. Ninety minutes to the deadline. That was when the post went up, and the war paused, held in place by a 10-point document drafted by Tehran. This is the story of the race to the ceasefire announced by Trump.

Japan and China are getting 'physical' with AI. But India has a different problemJapan's latest physical AI push has exposed a widening global robotics gap. China is already deploying robots at scale, while Japan is backing it with billions and policy. India has promising pilots but lacks a unified strategy, partly by choice, partly because its challenges look very different.

We would love to, but...: Iran Consulate reacts to Indian man's job queryAkshay Anand, an X user, asked the Consulate General of the Islamic Republic of Iran in Mumbai whether Indians are hired for its media team.

Overnight rain and storm in several states: What's the weather ahead?The cooler climate caused by the spell of rain and storms in several Indian states should be enjoyed because temperatures are expected to climb significantly by the end of the month.

sports.headline: When will J&K pacer Auqib Nabi make his IPL debut? IPL 2026: Delhi Capitals are set to play Gujarat Titans at their own backyard on Wednesday, April 8. Despite acquiring Jammu and Kashmir pacer Auqib Nabi for Rs 8.40 crore, Delhi have not handed him a debut yet in the IPL.

DC vs GT: Gill back for struggling Gujarat as Delhi eye a fortress at Kotla IPL, DC vs GT Preview: Delhi Capitals look to build on their strong start at home as they chase a hat-trick of wins. Shubman Gill's return, meanwhile, offers a timely boost to a struggling Gujarat Titans side.

Bindaas Vaibhav Sooryavanshi forcing Jaiswal to level-up at Rajasthan Royals IPL, RR vs MI: Yashasvi Jaiswal and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi ripped apart Mumbai Indians in Guwahati on April 7. After the win, Jaiswal spoke about how young Sooryavanshi was forcing him to level up at Rajasthan Royals.

Sooryvanshi's evolution will be fun to watch: MI coach Jayawardane on RR starboy IPL 2026: Mahela Jayawardene praised Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's fearless knock against MI, calling his evolution exciting to watch. The 15-year-old stunned Jasprit Bumrah with two sixes, continuing his formidable start to the season.

IPL Play Of The Day: MI's big guns fail to replicate Jaiswal-Sooryavanshi blitz IPL 2026: On a rainy day which saw the game being reduced to 11 overs, RR sent out Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and Yashasvi Jaiswal to play a bit of contra on the field and shoot at everything. But when it came to MI, the approach seemed to lack the intent needed to pull off a big chase.

HD Throwback: Why Vaibhav Sooryavanshi vs Bumrah felt like Sachin vs Qadir IPL 2026: 37 years after Sachin Tendulkar's sixes against Abdul Qadir in Peshawar, history finds a high-definition mirror in Guwahati. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's fearless takedown of Jasprit Bumrah captured the same rare, transcendent magic as that legendary 1989 encounter on Tuesday.

IPL 2026: How Buttler is trusting his game and experience for GT form revival Jos Buttler is backing his own game and experience to turn things around in the IPL with the Gujarat Titans after a poor 2026 in T20Is. Buttler has had a decent start to his IPL 2026 campaign but is yet to contribute a big total.

Storm after rain: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and Yashasvi Jaiswal blow MI away IPL 2026, RR vs MI: Rain couldn't stop the Rajasthan Royals' momentum as Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and Yashasvi Jaiswal turned an 11-over shootout into a masterclass in carnage. Sinking Mumbai Indians by 27 runs in Guwahati, the 2008 champions remain flawless in IPL 2026, reclaiming the top spot with their third consecutive win.

Candidates chess: Praggnanandhaa loses, almost out of contention for top place Indian Grandmaster R Praggnanandhaa suffered a setback in the Candidates tournament after losing to Anish Giri in the eighth round in Chennai. The loss has hurt his chances of finishing at the top.

Ravi Shastri stand to be unveiled at Wankhede, MCA to honour Mumbai greats The Mumbai cricket association has decided to unveil the Ravi Shastri stand at the Wankhede Stadium on Thursday, April 8. Along with Shastri, Diana Edulji, Dilip Sardesai will also be honoured by the MCA.

Mohammed Shami should play for India again: Ganguly sends reminder to Agarkar IPL 2026: Former India captain Sourav Ganguly has firmly backed Mohammed Shami's return to the senior national team, stating that the 35-year-old pacer remains supremely fit and hungry to keep adding to his wicket tally. Shami has been in impressive form for Lucknow Super Giants in the ongoing IPL season.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi stuns Bumrah with first-ball six, MI ace can only smileVaibhav Sooryavanshi showed no fear against Jasprit Bumrah and dispatched the Indian star pacer for a first-ball six in Guwahati.

After PSL ball-tampering scandal, Fakhar Zaman addresses T20I retirement rumoursPakistan opener Fakhar Zaman has dismissed speculation around his T20I retirement, clarifying that he has no immediate plans to step away from the shortest format despite recent controversy during the Pakistan Super League (PSL) 2026 season.

Billie Jean King Cup: Unforced errors haunt Vaishnavi, India trail 0-1 vs ThailandIndia's Vaishnavi Adkar suffered a straight-sets defeat to Thailand's Aunchisa Chanta as the hosts went down 0-1 in their opening Asia/Oceania Group I tie of the Billie Jean King Cup on Tuesday.

How RCB homecoming changed Padikkal and helped him find his brand of cricketDevdutt Padikkal revealed how the IPL 2025 auction was the turning point of his career and how he found his style of cricket during his second stint in RCB. Padikkal has scored two fifties in as many games during IPL 2026.

High-flying DC not feeling Starc's absence yet: Bowling coach Munaf PatelDelhi Capitals bowling coach Munaf Patel has said that the team isn't Mitchell Starc just yet after winning their first two games of the IPL 2026 season. Starc is currently recovering from an injury.

Gujarat Titans receive timely Shubman Gill boost before Delhi Capitals gameIPL 2026, DC vs GT: Sai Sudharsan has confirmed that Shubman Gill will return to lead the Gujarat Titans in their IPL 2026 clash against Delhi Capitals at the Arun Jaitley Stadium on Wednesday.

Ex-Arsenal and Juventus midfielder Aaron Ramsey announces retirementAaron Ramsey has announced his immediate retirement from professional football, bringing an end to a 20-year career that saw him represent top clubs including Arsenal and Juventus. The Welsh midfielder also played a key role for the Wales national football team, notably helping them reach the semi-finals of UEFA Euro 2016 and qualify for the FIFA World Cup 2022.

Tamim replaces Aminul Islam as Bangladesh cricket chief after T20 World Cup rowTamim Iqbal takes charge as the new Bangladesh cricket president, replacing Aminul Islam as the country looks to rebuild following the T20 World Cup fiasco.

Will Sooryavanshi treat Bumrah like any other bowler? Pundits predictVaibhav Sooryavanshi and Jasprit Bumrah are all set to battle it out in a prodigy vs master clash when RR face MI in Guwahati on Tuesday, April 8. RR vs MI Highlights: Rajasthan crush Mumbai in rain-curtailed Guwahati clashRajasthan Royals (RR) vs Mumbai Indians (MI) Highlights, IPL 2026: Rajasthan Royals surged to three wins in three, extending their flawless start with a convincing 27-run victory in a rain-shortened 11-over clash. The win takes RR to 3-0 in IPL 2026, while Mumbai Indians, after beginning with a victory, have now stumbled to back-to-back defeats.

Harry Maguire signs contract extension at Manchester UnitedFormer captain Harry Maguire has signed a new one-year contract with Manchester United, with the option to extend for a further year. The 33-year-old central defender had been nearing the end of his current deal, which would expire at the conclusion of the season.

Real Madrid vs Bayern Munich: European Clasico returns, odds tilt German wayBayern Munich arrive in Madrid as the more settled side, while Real Madrid rely on big-game moments. Warner arrested for drink-driving in Sydney. Will it affect Pak league stint?Former Australian opener David Warner was arrested for drink-driving in Sydney on Sunday while on a break from his Pakistan Super League duties. Warner has been leading the Karachi Kings in the 11th edition of the PSL.

Jannik Sinner admits missing Carlos Alcaraz rivalry, hopes for Monte Carlo showdownMonte Carlo Masters: Jannik Sinner said he misses facing Carlos Alcaraz and their rivalry, adding that he enjoys their battles because the Spaniard pushes him to his limits.

IPL sacrifices made me lose my England career: Pietersen opens up on ECB falloutKevin Pietersen said his dispute with the England and Wales Cricket Board over playing in the Indian Premier League led to the premature end of his international career, calling it a personal sacrifice that later benefited other players. He added that his stance helped pave the way for England cricketers to participate more freely in franchise T20 leagues.

Vaishnavi Adkar crowned India's new tennis No.1 with sensational run in 2026Vaishnavi Adkar's dream 2026 run has taken her to the top of Indian women's singles, with the 21-year-old climbing from World No. 643 to No.383 to become the country's new No.1. She is currently taking part in the Billie Jean King Cup 2026 in New Delhi.

Dump ODIs, stick to T20s and IPL: Lalit Modi's bold suggestion sparks buzzLalit Modi has stirred debate by calling for ODI cricket to be scrapped, arguing the format no longer fits the modern game shaped by T20 leagues and shifting fan interest. His comments come even as attention slowly builds towards the 2027 ODI World Cup.

Shreyas Iyer's sister not holding back, trolls KKR after washout in Kolkata: WatchIPL 2026: Shreyas Iyer's sister, Shresta, went viral after cheekily trolling Kolkata Knight Riders with an Instagram reel following the rain-hit washout of their clash against Punjab Kings at Eden Gardens.

Hetmyer's form not a concern for RR: Coach backs batter to rise from slumpIPL 2026: RR have downplayed concerns over Shimron Hetmyer's slow start to IPL 2026, backing the West Indies star to come good soon. Performance coach Siddhartha Lahiri stressed that it is too early to judge, insisting the team remains confident in its middle-order strength.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
